active_milestone.scope: Session-log local diagnostic boundary and generated command metadata.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Remove obsolete promotion/share-safety framing from ordinary session-log surfaces and replace it with a local-only non-authoritative diagnostic boundary.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not build a promotion/privacy subsystem, redact or rewrite raw local capture by default, or treat manual human handoff as AW-owned.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact local-boundary metadata shape, generated command wording, and focused regression coverage for status, prelude, index, export, and analysis.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A correct fix requires changing the local override config contract, removing path normalization compatibility, or introducing a managed transfer workflow.
